      <title><![CDATA[Revised wage rules hit IT, Banks hard as labour codes take effect]]></title>

      <description><![CDATA[HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank saw significant employee cost hikes in December 2025 due to new labour codes, with IT giants like TCS and Infosys also reporting major expense increases.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[Metropolis Healthcare has launched a Centre for Genomics to expand its specialty diagnostics business.       <description><![CDATA[Lemon Tree Hotels will split its subsidiary Fleur Hotels into a separately listed company and bring in Warburg Pincus as a strategic investor.       <title><![CDATA[New labour rules will make hiring costlier, say staffing firms]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/new-labour-laws-code-raise-compliance-costs-impact-can-be-absorbed-teamlease-info-edge-pf-esi-alpha-article-19819759.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[Executives from TeamLease Services and Info Edge said India’s new labour codes will increase PF and ESI contributions due to a standardised wage definition, raising compliance costs for companies. However, TeamLease said the impact can be absorbed within one annual increment cycle. Info Edge cautioned that higher hiring costs may pressure corporate margins. For gig and quick commerce firms, the shift may largely replace private insurance spending with government social security contributions, limiting the overall cost increase.]]></description>

      <description><![CDATA[Indian rice exporters are facing new risks after the US warned of a 25% tariff on countries trading with Iran. KRBL said its current exposure to Iran is $8–10 million, down from about $100 million in 2018. Industry data shows Iran remains the second largest buyer of Indian basmati rice, with exports of $470 million so far this year. Exporters report falling domestic prices and over ₹2,000 crore in delayed payments due to disruptions inside Iran.]]></description>

    <item>
      <title><![CDATA[Budget 2026: EY for tax certainty as Budget nears, awaits rules & proposes amendments to New Income Tax Act]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/budget/budget-2026-ey-flags-tax-uncertainty-new-income-tax-act-demerger-buyback-share-deals-19817140.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[As the new Income Tax Act is set to replace the six-decade-old law from April 2026, EY has warned that unresolved legal ambiguities around corporate restructurings, share buybacks and valuation rules could lead to fresh disputes unless addressed in the upcoming Budget.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Thu, 8 Jan 2026 19:07:10 +0530]]></pubDate>
